case.title: HERRIN TRANSPORTATION CO. v. UNITED STATES

opinion.h1: HERRIN TRANSPORTATION CO. v. UNITED STATES, 366 U.S. 419 (1961)
opinion.h4: HERRIN TRANSPORTATION CO. v. UNITED STATES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE SOUTHERN DISTRICT OF TEXAS. No. 837. Decided May 22, 1961.
opinion.p: Solicitor General Cox, Assistant Attorney General Loevinger, Richard A. Solomon, Robert W. Ginnane and James Y. Piper for the United States, and Ewell H. Muse, Jr. for Strickland Transportation Co., appellees.
The motions to affirm are granted and the judgment is affirmed.
